messages.content:
Translate to Mandarin Chinese

"I want a burger."
我想要一个汉堡。

Translate to Mandarin Chinese

"National Football League of Peace and Friendship"
和平友谊国家橄榄球联盟

Translate to Mandarin Chinese (with romanization)

"What is a prison if everyone is a prisoner?"
"如果每个人都是囚犯，那什么是监狱呢？" (Rúguǒ měi gè rén dōu shì qiúfàn, nà shénme shì jiānyù ne?)

Translate to Mandarin Chinese

"Partial copy created from external data recorded in a sophont's exoself (external self / extension of one's consciousness beyond the body)."
从记录在一个智人外在自我（外部自我/意识超越身体的延伸）中的外部数据创建的部分拷贝。

Translate to Mandarin Chinese (with romanization)

"Exclusive Ecological Zone"
专属生态区 (zhuānshǔ shēngtài qū)

Translate to Mandarin Chinese (with romanization)

"Auxiliary AI"
辅助人工智能 (fǔzhù réngōng zhìnéng)

Translate to Mandarin Chinese (with romanization)

"Do you wish to continue with this program?

YES

NO"

您是否希望继续这个程序？

是

否

(Nín shìfǒu xīwàng jìxù zhège chéngxù?

Shì

Fǒu)

Translate to Korean
"Maximum time for wearing costume doll is 30 minutes."
인형 탈을 착용할 수 있는 최대 시간은 30분입니다.

Translate to Korean (archaic/informal) (Surprised tone)

"He's on a mission from God!?"
그는 신의 사명을 받았다고!?

Translate to Korean

"What is a prison if everyone is a prisoner?"
모두가 죄수라면 감옥이란 무엇인가?

Translate to Korean (with romanization)

"So what does that mean?"

"그러면 그게 무슨 뜻이야?"

(geureomyeon geuge museun tteus-iya?)

Translate to Korean (archaic/informal)

"It's a little annoying but we'll get there."
조금 성가시지만 갈 거야.

Translate to Korean (archaic/informal)

"Why are the animals working? We trained them."
왜 동물들이 일하고 있느냐? 우리가 훈련시켰다네.
